\tzpentry{ID5578}{Angular Velocity Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5578 introduces Angular Velocity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \dot{\Omega}_i^{\mathrm{node}} = \nu_i + \sum_{j \neq i} C_{ij}\,\sin\!\big(\Omega_j^{\mathrm{node}} - \Omega_i^{\mathrm{node}}\big)\,. \tag{12}\]
